title: Natural Sandstone
description: A texture pack that changes the way Sandstone looks from the side to look better!
body:
A texturepack that changes the way Sandstone looks from the side to look better,

which in short means that it turns the strangely smooth part and gives it a wavy texture.

![Better Sandstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6a3b6216558ee7d29d26eef23aab1920263a998.png)

![Sand castle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2caf08048a8d4703683e0cb7897ce88716727fc_0.webp)
